title: leontodon tingitanus
intro: Leontodon tingitanus, also known as Marjolin's Hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial plant with a rosette of leaves and a yellow dandelion-like flower head. The medicinal properties of Leontodon tingitanus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used in salads or as a garnish, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting digestive health.
